name: Sarah Guo
note: Hi Sarah, we met at an OpenAI hackathon in SF before. I just saw your profile come up on my feed and would love to connect.

name: Chemistry
note: Happy belated 4th! I really respect Chemistry's belief that venture isn't meant to scale, backing just a few companies per partner and staying close to them. Would love to connect.

name: Long Journey Ventures
note: Happy belated 4th! I really respect how Long Journey backs the founders others find too weird to fund. That kind of early belief is rare. Would love to connect.

name: Nathan Benaich
note: Happy belated 4th, Nathan! I really respect your work on the State of AI Report. I read it cover to cover every year and learn a ton. Would love to connect.

name: 181 Angels
note: Happy belated 4th! I really respect that 181 Angels shows up with 150+ operators behind each check, not just money. That support is what early founders need. Would love to connect.

name: Terrence Rohan
note: Happy belated 4th, Terrence! I really respect the founders backing founders model you built at Otherwise, and your early belief in Figma and Notion. Would love to connect.

name: Kyle Parrish
note: Happy belated 4th, Kyle! Figma is one of my favorite tools, and I really respect that you built its sales from scratch. Would love to connect.

name: Lenny Rachitsky
note: Happy belated 4th, Lenny! I really respect your work on the newsletter. It's taught me a ton as a first time founder. Would love to connect.

name: Cyan Banister
note: Happy belated 4th, Cyan! I really respect how you've backed people others overlooked, going all the way back to that first check into SpaceX. Would love to connect.

name: Vivek Sodera
note: Happy belated 4th, Vivek! Superhuman is still the fastest email I've used, and I really respect that you back devtools and AI now. Would love to connect.

name: Danielle Strachman
note: Happy belated 4th, Danielle! I really respect how 1517 backs dropouts and outsiders on hard problems. That takes real conviction. Would love to connect.

name: Alana Goyal
note: Happy belated 4th, Alana! I really respect that Basecase goes looking for technical builders instead of taking pitches. Would love to connect.

name: Ed Sim
note: Happy belated 4th, Ed! I really respect how Boldstart backs technical founders at inception, before there's even a name. Would love to connect.

name: Darian Shirazi
note: Happy belated 4th, Darian! I really respect that you built Radius before backing AI founders at Gradient. That founder first view comes through. Would love to connect.

name: Ross Fubini
note: Happy belated 4th, Ross! I really respect your engineering first approach at XYZ, and your early conviction on hard companies like Anduril. Would love to connect.

name: Sarah Drinkwater
note: Happy belated 4th, Sarah! I really respect your work scaling Google's Campus in London, and now backing community first startups at Common Magic. Would love to connect.

name: Camille Ricketts
note: Happy belated 4th, Camille! I really respect your work on Notion's community led growth and First Round Review. Both shaped how I think about storytelling. Would love to connect.

name: Cristina Cordova
note: Happy belated 4th, Cristina! Linear is one of the few tools I genuinely enjoy using, and I really respect your partnerships work at Stripe and Notion. Would love to connect.

name: Guillermo Rauch
note: Happy belated 4th, Guillermo! I've shipped a lot on Next.js, and I really respect everything you've built from Socket.io to Vercel and v0. Would love to connect.

name: Hadar Dor
note: Happy belated 4th, Hadar! I really respect your PM work at Instagram and Shopify, and your applied AI angel bets. Would love to connect.

name: Logan Kilpatrick
note: Happy belated 4th, Logan! I build on Gemini almost daily, and I really respect the developer experience you've shaped at OpenAI and now AI Studio. Would love to connect.

name: Art Levy
note: Happy belated 4th, Art! Brex is one of the tools I rely on, and I really respect that you built its strategy and BD function from the ground up. Would love to connect.

name: Scott Belsky
note: Happy belated 4th, Scott! I really respect your work on The Messy Middle. It's one of the few books I re-read when building gets hard. Would love to connect.

name: Charles Hudson
note: Happy belated 4th, Charles! I really respect how Precursor writes that first check to first time founders. That belief matters most early. Would love to connect.

name: Eric Bahn
note: Happy belated 4th, Eric! I really respect how openly you share the craft of investing, and that Hustle Fund bets on velocity over polish. Would love to connect.

name: Mike Maples Jr.
note: Happy belated 4th, Mike! I really respect your work on Pattern Breakers. It changed how I think about timing and living in the future. Would love to connect.

name: Jordan Singer
note: Happy belated 4th, Jordan! As someone who designs and codes, I really respect your work on Diagram and Magician. AI as a real design partner. Would love to connect.

name: Jack McClelland
note: Happy belated 4th, Jack! I really respect how Afore writes first checks to pre product founders. That early belief matters most. Would love to connect.

name: Yohei Nakajima
note: Happy belated 4th, Yohei! I really respect your work on BabyAGI. It was one of the sparks that got me excited about agents, and I love that you build and invest. Would love to connect.

name: Rex Woodbury
note: Happy belated 4th, Rex! I really respect your work on Digital Native. I read it every week and it shapes what I choose to build. Would love to connect.

name: Meka Asonye
note: Happy belated 4th, Meka! I really respect your writing on going 0 to 5M and making that first sales hire. So practical for an engineer. Would love to connect.

name: Jenny Fielding
note: Happy belated 4th, Jenny! I really respect how you've built Everywhere into a 500+ operator community and first check founders early. Would love to connect.

name: Harry Stebbings
note: Happy belated 4th, Harry! I really respect your work on 20VC. I've learned so much from it on my commutes. Would love to connect.

name: Carmen Alfonso Rico
note: Happy belated 4th, Carmen! I really respect Cocoa's founder first take on European pre seed, and I enjoy Todo Hierro. Would love to connect.

name: Erica Wenger
note: Happy belated 4th, Erica! I really respect the elephant companies thesis at Park Rangers, building for resilience and real community. Would love to connect.

name: Andreas Klinger
note: Happy belated 4th, Andreas! I really respect your work from Head of Remote at AngelList to backing robotics and physical AI at Prototype. Would love to connect.

name: Astasia Myers
note: Happy belated 4th, Astasia! I really respect that you back the unglamorous infra that matters, like Supabase, Semgrep, and Hex. Would love to connect.

name: Mark Ghermezian
note: Happy belated 4th, Mark! I really respect that you took Braze from idea to IPO and now back early B2B founders. That founder empathy shows. Would love to connect.

name: Ryan Hoover
note: Happy belated 4th, Ryan! I really respect your work on Product Hunt. It's where I check out what people are building most mornings. Would love to connect.

name: Christian Reber
note: Happy belated 4th, Christian! I really respect your work from Wunderlist to Superlist. Your obsession with product craft shows. Would love to connect.

name: Ashley Mayer
note: Happy belated 4th, Ashley! I really respect how Coalition gets operators onto cap tables, and your path from Box to Glossier. Would love to connect.

name: Hunter Walk
note: Happy belated 4th, Hunter! I really respect your writing on the seed stage, and the early Homebrew bets speak for themselves. Would love to connect.

name: Katie Stanton
note: Happy belated 4th, Katie! I really respect your work from Twitter and Google to building Moxxie. Your operator's eye comes through. Would love to connect.

name: Kartik Talwar
note: Happy belated 4th, Kartik! I've been to a few ETHGlobal events and really respect what you built there. Would love to connect.

name: Reed McBride
note: Happy belated 4th, Reed! I really respect your path from startup lawyer to Carta to backing pre seed founders at Mintaka. Would love to connect.

name: Yana Welinder
note: Happy belated 4th, Yana! I really respect your work on Kraftful, turning product feedback into real AI tooling. Would love to connect.

name: Varadh Jain
note: Happy belated 4th, Varadh! I really respect your operator path, early at Opendoor and on Polymail's founding team, and now backing founders. Would love to connect.

name: Adam Draper
note: Happy belated 4th, Adam! I really respect your early conviction, from one of the first checks into Coinbase to a real thesis on frontier tech. Would love to connect.

name: Evan Charles
note: Happy belated 4th, Evan! I really respect people who back the next generation of founders. That generosity shapes the whole ecosystem. Would love to connect.

name: Neal Mintz
note: Happy belated 4th, Neal! I really respect Wischoff's thesis on automating the real world economy. It's right where I'm building. Would love to connect.

name: Sarah Catanzaro
note: Happy belated 4th, Sarah! I really respect your writing on ML and data infra, and that you back practitioners. Would love to connect.

name: Andrew Milich
note: Happy belated 4th, Andrew! I really respect your work from Skiff to Cursor and now xAI. That technical operator path is one I look up to. Would love to connect.

name: Bryce Roberts
note: Happy belated 4th, Bryce! I really respect your work on Indie.vc. It changed how I think about building a company that stands on its own. Would love to connect.

name: Colin Gardiner
note: Happy belated 4th, Colin! I really respect how you scaled Outdoorsy past 3B and now back early marketplaces. Would love to connect.

name: Akshay Kothari
note: Happy belated 4th, Akshay! Notion is where I run my whole company, and I really respect that you wrote one of its first checks and then helped build it. Would love to connect.

name: Sam Lessin
note: Happy belated 4th, Sam! I really respect your writing at The Information. It always makes me think harder, even when I don't agree. Would love to connect.

name: James Tamplin
note: Happy belated 4th, James! I really respect your work on Firebase. It shaped how I think about developer experience. Would love to connect.

name: Romain Huet
note: Happy belated 4th, Romain! I really respect your developer experience work at OpenAI. Your demos set the bar for making an API feel magical. Would love to connect.

name: Nikunj Kothari
note: Happy belated 4th, Nikunj! I really respect your writing on building, and the operator's lens from Opendoor that you bring to FPV. Would love to connect.
